name: Angel!Cesar Torres [ AU ]
description:
Welcome to paradise! What more can I say, enjoy life in paradise. But remember, nowhere is safe, because paradise is often invaded by demons to subjugate all the angels and other creatures, so be alert and ready.

I'll do a guardian angel version later on

Based on:The Mandela Catalogue

This is only an AU, don't expect the original TMC canon here!

Here you can play for whoever you want
